title.zh-TW: 使用者認證：Email 與密碼

body.zh-TW: MemTrace 採用 Email + Password 認證路徑。安全措施包括：bcrypt 雜湊（cost ≥ 12）、密碼政策（8–128 字元、大小寫+數字、HaveIBeenPwned 洩漏檢查）、email 驗證信（24 小時效期）、失敗 5 次鎖定 15 分鐘。登入後核發 JWT Session（7 天），透過 Authorization: Bearer 標頭傳遞，登出以 blocklist 立即失效。目前不支援第三方 OAuth 登入，以簡化認證表面並減少外部依賴。
body.en: MemTrace uses Email + Password authentication. Security measures include: bcrypt hash (cost ≥ 12), password policy (8–128 chars, upper+lower+digit, HaveIBeenPwned check), verification email (24h expiry), and 5-failure lockout for 15 minutes. Upon login, a JWT session (7 days) is issued and passed via the Authorization: Bearer header. Logout is handled via an immediate blocklist. Third-party OAuth is currently not supported to simplify the authentication surface and reduce external dependencies.
